classes.label: Class 1
products: Lip Products of all Types (Solid & Liquid) lipsticks, Balms & Wax (Clear or Colored)

classes.label: Class 2
products: Body Sprays & Mists, Men & Women (intended or labeled for use in axillae)
Deodorant and Antiperspirant Products of all types (spray, stick, roll-on, under-arm & body, etc.)

classes.label: Class 3
products: 3.A - Hydroalcoholic Products Applied to Recently Shaved Skin (EDT)
3.B - Hydroalcoholic Products Applied to Recently Shaved Skin (Fine Fragrance)
3.C - Eye Products of all Types (eye shadow, mascara, eyeliner, eye make-up, make-up, etc.) including eye care

classes.label: Class 4
products: 4.A - Hydroalcoholic Products Applied To Unshaved Skin (EDT)
4.B - Hydroalcoholic Products Applied To Unshaved Skin (Cologne, EDP or Parfum)
4.C - Body Creams, Oils, Lotions of all types (except baby products)
4.C - Hair Styling Aids, Hair Sprays of all Types

classes.label: Class 5
products: Hair Permanent & Chemical Treatments (e.g. relaxers) but not hair dyes
Wipes or Refreshing Tissues for Face, Neck, Hands, Body

classes.label: Class 7
products: 7.B - Insect Repellent (intended to be applied to the skin)

classes.label: Class 8
products: 8.A - Hair Styling Aids Non-Spray of all types (mousse, gels, leave-in conditioners)
8.A - Make-up Removers of all types (not including face cleansers)
8.A - Powders & Talcs, All Types (Except baby Powders & Talcs)

classes.label: Class 9
products: 9.A - Bath Gels, Foams, Mousses, Salts, Oils & other products added to bathwater
9.A - Body Washes of all types (including baby washes) & Shower Gels of all Type
9.A - Depilatory, all (including Body Waxes for mechanical hair removal)
9.A - Face Cleansers of all types (washes, gels, scrubs, etc.)
9.A - Shampoos of all types (including baby shampoos)
9.A - Shaving Creams of all types (stick, gels, foams, etc.)
9.C - Air fresheners sprays (incl. Room Sprays, Aerosols & Pump)

classes.label: Class 10
products: 10.A - Fabric Softeners of all types including fabric softener sheets
10.A - Handwash Laundry Detergents of all types including concentrates
10.A - Hard Surface Cleaners (Bathroom & Kitchen Cleansers & Furniture polish, etc.)
10.A - Machine Wash Laundry Detergent & Bleach (liquids, powders, tablets, etc.)
10.A - Other Household Cleaning Products (fabric, soft surface & Carpet Cleaners)

classes.label: Class 11
products: Air Delivery Systems (Automated or with Manual Activator) with no contact with dispensing port
Air Fresheners (Solids, Liquid or Closed systems). Excluding Manual Deliver Room Spray Products
All Non-Skin, or incidental skin, Contact
Concentrated Aerosol Air Fresheners for metered systems
Deodorizers/Maskers not intended for skin contact
Insecticides (mosquito coil, paper, electrical, for clothing) excluding aerosols
Joss Sticks, Incense, Crystals/Stones, Blotters, Sachets & Fragrance Lamp Ring
Liquid Air Freshener Refills (Cartridge & Non-Cartridge Systems)
Odored Distilled Water (that can be added to steam irons)
Reed Diffusers & Liquid Refills (Cartridge & Non-Cartridge Systems)
Scent delivery systems using dry air technology
Treated Textiles (starch sprays, fabric treated with fragrance after wash, etc.)

classes.label: Class 12
products: Products with intended skin contact but where migration to skin is not expected (e.g. wet wipes for surfaces)
Products not intended to have contact with skin (e.g. sachets with no skin contact)
